'''Hornagaunts''' were furred, multi-stomached creatures with wings that were often clipped when domesticated. They were native to [[Tertiary Kesmere]]. Their personalities were marked by an inherent aggressiveness which made them dangerous but useful as pets. One hornaguant called [[Grendel]] was kept by the droid information-broker [[8t88/Legends|8t88]]. 

Hornagaunts had a monstrous appearance had acute smelling and produced growling or purring sounds, either to express pleasure, or alertness. They have an underthrust jaw and big eye-lids. At least some had glowing red [[eye/Legends|eyes]]. When in comfort, or in inquiring mood, they struck their stubby tail on the ground.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>
